refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall analyze the worksite area to identify terrain features, obstacles, and work-zone boundaries to generate a comprehensive worksite model/map.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is decomposed to explicitly state the analysis and modeling tasks, clarifying the scope of worksite features to be included for planning and execution.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by comparing generated worksite model/map against ground truth data and stakeholder requirements for terrain, obstacles, and work-zone representation.
sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Define and represent work-zone boundaries and areas.

candidate_dps: DP1: Use sensor fusion algorithms combining LIDAR, camera, and GPS data for terrain and obstacle analysis.
DP2: Implement a geospatial data processing pipeline to generate and update the worksite model/map.
DP3: Apply rule-based and machine learning methods to classify and represent work-zone boundaries.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Use sensor fusion algorithms combining LIDAR, camera, and GPS data for terrain and obstacle analysis.

potential_sources: Data dependencies between terrain and obstacle analysis modules.
Interface dependencies with teleoperation and safety services for real-time updates.
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically separates terrain and obstacle analysis but requires careful interface design to avoid tight coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability and reliability of sensor data.
Risk of incomplete or inaccurate terrain/obstacle detection impacting safety.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing terrain and obstacle analysis separately if coupling issues arise in implementation.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system responsible for worksite mapping and model generation.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives sensor data streams (LIDAR, camera, GPS) for analysis.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends updated worksite model/map data to planning and execution modules.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Communicates detected obstacles or hazardous terrain to Safety Services.

module_containment_scores.notes: Primary module for worksite mapping; high containment of related functions.
Limited direct containment; mainly consumes mapping data.
Receives mapping data but does not implement mapping functions.
Consumes alerts but does not perform mapping.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Worksite mapping functions are best contained within the NGHE Solution module to centralize data processing and minimize diffusion.
containment_risks: Potential performance bottlenecks if all sensor data processing is centralized.
Risk of interface overload with multiple consumers of mapping data.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate splitting sensor data preprocessing into submodules if performance or interface complexity increases.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FRs with clear mapping from terrain and obstacle analysis to sensor fusion algorithms.

diffusion_risks: Centralizing all mapping functions in NGHE Solution may increase module complexity.
Interfaces to other modules must be carefully managed to avoid tight coupling.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as the primary owner; diffusion is low but should be monitored.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing the NGHE Solution module outputs against known site data and stakeholder acceptance criteria.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FRs to NGHE Solution module with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Monitor interface complexity and consider modularizing sensor data preprocessing.
Plan for performance testing to validate centralized processing approach.

decision.justification: The current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meets the requirements and passes gate reviews with manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Define and represent work-zone boundaries and areas.

revise.why: No immediate revisions required; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Sensor data is reliable and available in real-time.
NGHE Solution module has sufficient processing capacity.
open_risks: Interface complexity with multiple consuming modules.
evidence_needed: Performance benchmarks of NGHE Solution processing.
Verification results of worksite model accuracy.
